description:
As a user of the automation exercise application
  I want to search for specific products
  So that I can find products that match my criteria

steps.name: Given  the API endpoint is available for products
When  I make a POST request to "${api.endpoint.product.search}" with search parameter "top"
Then  the response status code should be 200
And  the response should contain searched products for "top"
And  the response JSON schema should be valid for search results
